prompt: A photorealistic selfie of a young tanned woman lying on a striped towel at a {argument name="location" default="sandy beach with rocky cliffs"}. She has a messy brown bun and makes a playful face, {argument name="facial expression" default="winking and sticking her tongue out"}. She wears a white baseball cap and a white swimsuit, both displaying the text "{argument name="clothing text" default="ANTHROPIC"}" in black. Bright daylight, ocean waves, and a partly cloudy sky complete the background.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真的自拍，展示了一位 {argument name="subject description" default="扎着凌乱丸子头、皮肤黝黑、棕色头发的年轻女性"} 躺在 {argument name="location" default="背景为沙滩、海浪和岩石峭壁的"} 条纹沙滩巾上。她正对着镜头 {argument name="facial expression" default="眨眼并俏皮地吐着舌头"}。她戴着一顶白色棒球帽，穿着一件白色圆领泳衣，两者上都印有粗体黑色字母“{argument name="brand text" default="ANTHROPIC"}”。她戴着小巧的金色圆圈耳环和一条细金项链。光线明亮且充满阳光，捕捉到了夏日休闲、随性的氛围，头顶是蓝天和零星的云朵。

breakdown.creativeCore: 品牌海滩自拍：生成一张照片级逼真的自拍，展示一个人在海滩上穿着带有定制品牌标识的服装。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
